{{ template "base" . }} {{ define "extraHead" }} {{ if .FAQs }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ define "content" }}
{{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" (dict "SlotID" "dev-base64-top" "Size" "728x90" "Mobile" "320x50" "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled) }}

{{ call .T "hero.base64.title" }}

{{ call .T "hero.base64.subtitle" }}

{{ call .T "hero.base64.badge1" }} {{ call .T "hero.base64.badge2" }} {{ call .T "hero.base64.badge3" }}

{{ call .T "input.base64.file_label" }}

Any file · Max 50MB

Release to encode file

Waiting for input…
{{ call .T "result.base64.output_label" }} 0 characters 

      


      

        
        
        
      

    

  


  {{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" (dict "SlotID" "dev-base64-sidebar" "Size" "300x250" "MobileHide" true "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled) }}





  

    

      
🛡️

      
{{ call .T "feature.privacy.title" }}

      
{{ call .T "feature.privacy.desc" }}

    

    

      
⚡

      
{{ call .T "feature.speed.title" }}

      
{{ call .T "feature.speed.desc" }}

    

    

      
🆓

      
{{ call .T "feature.free.title" }}

      
{{ call .T "feature.free.desc" }}

    

  




{{ if .FAQs }}


  
FAQ

  

    {{ range $i, $faq := .FAQs }}
    

      
      
{{ $faq.A }}

    

    {{ end }}
  



{{ end }}

{{- template "partials/ad_slot.html" (dict "SlotID" "dev-base64-bottom" "Size" "728x90" "Mobile" "320x50" "ClientID" .AdsClientID "Enabled" .AdsEnabled) }}
